title: JustSearch i18n catalog
description: Envelope for backend-served i18n message catalogs. Per tempdoc 434 §"Catalog file shape". Concrete instances live under SSOT/messages/ (e.g. errors.en.json) and are served at /api/messages/<catalog-name>/<locale> per tempdoc 434 §"Catalog endpoint". This schema is the precedent-setting envelope per tempdoc 431 §F.1; downstream catalogs (shell strings, per-shape labels, plugin and theme catalogs) MUST conform to it.

$schema.description: Catalog schema namespace identifier. SHOULD equal this schema's $id ("https://ssot.justsearch/v1/schemas/i18n-catalog.json"). Optional in the wire format; required only when consumers want explicit schema attribution.

schemaVersion.description: Catalog schema version. Currently "1.0". Bumped only on breaking changes to this envelope shape; field additions to messages are NOT breaking.

locale.description: BCP 47 locale tag. V1 ships "en" only per tempdoc 434 §"What it does NOT support".

namespace.description: Catalog namespace. Examples: "errors" (this slice's catalog), "shell" (shell strings — future), "registry.admin-action" (per-shape — future), "plugin.acme-foo" (plugin — future), "theme.default" (theme — future). Keys inside `messages` MUST be namespace-prefixed (e.g. "errors.TIMEOUT").

messages.description: Map of i18n key → message text. Keys are namespace-prefixed (e.g. "errors.TIMEOUT"). Message text is the catalog's locale rendering of that key, possibly containing ICU MessageFormat placeholders like "{name}" or "{count, plural, one {# item} other {# items}}" per tempdoc 434 §5.
